scenario.name: REGISTER Flood Test
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:test.pbx.local SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:flood_[call_number]@test.pbx.local>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag[call_number] To: <sip:flood_[call_number]@test.pbx.local> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: sip:flood_[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
